AIS Notification.notes: Cinematic notification appears on page transitions with scan-line animation

AIS Memory.notes: localStorage persistence verified via browser DevTools

AIS Adaptive Timing.notes: Timing adapts based on tipsDismissed/tipsEngaged ratio

AIS Context Engine.notes: Page-aware contextual notifications: scanner shows scanner-specific tip

AIS Sounds.notes: Sound engine exists, toggle in settings works, but browser autoplay policy requires user gesture

AIS Assistant.notes: FAB visible, panel opens with 3 tabs (Navigation/Goal/Confidence)

AIS Settings.notes: 6 settings: AutoAssistant, Typing, AnimationIntensity, DismissSpeed, Sound, ActivityLevel

AIS Event Bus.notes: useAISEvents subscribes to event bus, contextual tips fire on route change

AIS Preferences.notes: autoAssistant preference respected (disables tips when off)

PLAT-015.name: Product Readiness Dashboard
PLAT-015.notes: Self-auditing: Product Readiness Dashboard audits the platform itself

PLAT-016.name: Unified AI Architecture Map
PLAT-016.notes: Main architecture dashboard at /app/architecture showing 4 AI centers (SIP/AIS/AI CTO/AIO) with readiness scores, communication graph, AI routing engine, future agents, unified terminology. Implements INT-048 BLOCK 6.

PLAT-017.name: SIP Center Detail
PLAT-017.notes: SIP (Security Intelligence Platform) detail page at /app/architecture/sip with 12 modules, KPIs, dependencies, communication links, evidence.

PLAT-018.name: AIS Center Detail
PLAT-018.notes: AIS (Adaptive Intelligence System) detail page at /app/architecture/ais with 12 modules including Memory/Context/Notification/Sound/Animation/Copilot/Goal/Confidence engines.

PLAT-019.name: AI CTO Center Detail
PLAT-019.notes: AI CTO (Product Intelligence Center) detail page at /app/architecture/cto with Capability Registry, Product Readiness, Product Debt, Trust Audit, Executive Summary, Recovery Queue, Dynamic Roadmap.

PLAT-020.name: AIO Center Detail
PLAT-020.notes: AIO (Autonomous Operations Center) detail page at /app/architecture/aio with Build/Deploy/Regression/Evidence/Sync/Recovery/Monitoring/Verification/Rollback modules.

PLAT-021.name: Command Center
PLAT-021.notes: Unified platform control page at /app/command-center replacing Dashboard. Shows Security Health (SIP), Platform Health, AIS Status, Automation Status (AIO), Recent Activity, Recommendations, Next Actions, Current Goals. Implements INT-049 BLOCK 5.

PLAT-022.name: Evolution Matrix
PLAT-022.notes: Platform evolution page at /app/evolution showing feature impact map across 4 centers (SIP/AIS/AI CTO/AIO) with stars ratings, Evolution Impact Analysis, AI Copilot Intent Detection demo, Platform Evolution Pipeline. Implements INT-049 BLOCK 1-4.

PLAT-023.name: Dynamic Two-Level Navigation
PLAT-023.notes: Sidebar restructured with first level (4 AI Centers + Command Center + Evolution + Architecture) and second level (Platform Tools: Scanner, Reports, Marketplace, etc). Implements INT-049 BLOCK 6.
